meaning: A-L-M (special letters at the start of this chapter)
the sending down (of الْكِتٰبِ - the Book)
in it (referring to الْكِتٰبِ - the book)
he made it up (object of يَقُولُونَ)
rather/but rather (contradicting what was claimed in أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ - 'Or do they say he made it up')
from (connects رَّبِّكَ to what comes before it)
so that you warn (purpose for افْتَرَىٰهُ)
from (with emphasis because it's connected to نَّذِيرٍ)
he created (subject of the relative clause after ٱلَّذِى)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
then will you not? (questioning why you don't تَتَذَكَّرُونَ - remember/take heed)
the matter (object of يُدَبِّرُ - He arranges)
to him (refers to يَعْرُجُ - it ascends)
a day (in فِى يَوْمٍ - in a day)
he/it was (describing the length of يَوْمٍ/day)
the Knower (of الغيب والشهادة - the unseen and witnessed)
and the witnessed (possessed by عٰلِمُ - Knower)
The Mighty One (describing Allah in this ayah)
the one who/which (connects to أَحْسَنَ - perfected)
he made excellent (the creation of كُلَّ شَىْءٍ)
every, all (object of خَلَقَهُۥ - He created it)
he created it (object of أَحْسَنَ - perfected)
the human being (connected to مِن طِينٍ)
then (connects to سَوَّىٰهُ - He fashioned him)
and He blew (connected to سَوَّىٰهُ - He fashioned him)
in him/it (referring to the soul/spirit being breathed)
from (connects رُّوحِهِ to the previous phrase)
and he made (connected to سَوَّىٰهُ - he fashioned him)
for you all (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
the strong hearing (object of جَعَلَ - he made)
and the sights (connected to السَّمْعَ - the hearing)
little (describes how much you give thanks)
is it when? (questioning what comes after ضَلَلْنَا)
is it that we? (questioning what comes in لَفِى خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ)
rather/but rather (contrasts with previous statement أَءِذَا ضَلَلْنَا)
in/with the meeting (of رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
their Lord (referring to those who deny the meeting with Him)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell the people about death)
he was put in charge (by مَّلَكُ ٱلْمَوْتِ - the angel of death)
by/with you all (object of وُكِّلَ - was put in charge)
your Lord (referring to all those being addressed)
you (all) are returned (to رَبِّكُمْ - your Lord)
their heads (the heads of the criminals mentioned in the ayah)
near/in the presence of (رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains them)
we do/work (requesting to do righteous deeds)
righteously (describing how we will act in نَعْمَلْ)
we willed (connected to لَءَاتَيْنَا - we would have given)
every, all (object of لَءَاتَيْنَا - we would have given)
its guidance (referring to each soul's guidance)
the statement (subject of حَقَّ - became true)
I will surely fill (what follows is جَهَنَّمَ - Hell)
all of them together (being acted upon by لَأَمْلَأَنَّ - I will surely fill)
so taste! (all of you) (connected to نَسِينٰكُمْ - We have forgotten you)
because of what (connects to تَعْمَلُونَ - you used to do)
your day (referring to the meeting/encounter mentioned in لِقَآءَ)
and all of you taste/experience! (command to a group)
of the eternal life (connected to عَذَابَ/punishment)
because of what (connects to نَسِيتُمْ - you forgot)
you all work/are working (referring to multiple people being addressed)
only/just/nothing but (restricts the meaning of يُؤْمِنُ that follows)
they fell down suddenly (with emphasis) (before سُجَّدًا/in prostration)
she/it moves herself away repeatedly (جُنُوبُهُمْ - their sides)
their sides (that move away from beds in worship)
the places of lying down (away from which their sides depart)
they call out/invite (to رَبَّهُمْ - their Lord)
in fear (object of يَدْعُونَ - they call)
and in hope (describing how they call upon their Lord)
and from what (that اللَّهِ provided them)
we provided them (what they spend from)
was hidden (referring to what has been hidden as a reward)
they work/act/do (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the surah)
is it then who (connected to يَسْتَوُۥنَ)
like who/like the one who (compared to مُؤْمِنًا - a believer)
As for... (introduces the topic of الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
those who (plural, refers to believers in ءَامَنُوا۟)
then for them (connected to جَنَّاتُ - gardens)
the place of shelter (final destination of المؤمنين - the believers)
as hospitality (for the believers in Paradise)
because of what (they were doing يَعْمَلُونَ)
they work/act/do (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
but as for (contrasting with what came before)
those who (subject of فَسَقُوا۟/they defiantly disobeyed)
then their place of shelter (is النَّارُ)
they were returned (passive subjects of فِيهَا)
and it was said (to the disbelievers)
taste! (command to many people) (what to taste is عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ - punishment of the Fire)
and surely we will make them taste
less than (describes العَذَابِ الْأَدْنَىٰ in relation to العَذَابِ الْأَكْبَرِ)
they return (referring to those who will taste punishment)
And who - combines 'and' with a question word
more/most unjust (describing who in وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ - and who is more unjust)
than who (comparing with ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ - the criminals)
was reminded (of بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ - the signs of his Lord)
with/by the signs/miracles (of رَبِّهِ - his Lord)
of his Lord (of the signs of رَبِّهِۦ)
and certainly/and indeed (connects to previous statement)
Moses (the one who was given الْكِتٰبَ)
so do not (connected to ءَاتَيْنَا - We gave)
any doubt (in فِى مِرْيَةٍ - in any doubt)
and we made him/it (referring to the Book/Scripture mentioned before)
from them (referring to those who were made leaders in وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْهُمْ أَئِمَّةً)
leaders (as the object being made by Allah)
they guide (leaders who guide with Allah's command)
and they were/existed (connecting to how they guide by Our command)
in/by our clear signs (that they firmly believe)
your Lord (being acted upon by إِنَّ indeed/truly)
between them (object of يَفْصِلُ - he judges)
day (object of يَفْصِلُ - He will judge)
in what (they used to differ about)
in it/him (referring to what they differed about)
and have they not (before يَهْدِ - guide)
how many (referring to أَهْلَكْنَا - we destroyed)
the generations (that were destroyed before them)
indeed/certainly (emphasizes فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ that follows)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to the signs/evidence mentioned in the previous words)
then will they not? (subject of يَسْمَعُونَ)
they hear/listen (referring to the people who walk in their dwellings)
we drive/lead (the water to the barren land)
the water (object of نَسُوقُ - we drive)
and so we bring out (crops with الْمَآءَ)
with it/by means of it (referring to ٱلْمَآءَ - the water)
then do they not? (connected to يُبْصِرُونَ - see)
when? (asking about the time of الْفَتْحُ/the victory)
of the victory (in يَوْمَ ٱلْفَتْحِ - day of the victory)
ones who are waiting (subject of إِنَّهُم)
